title: Mrbooyaa's Low Orange Shield
description: This texture pack includes a low shield look but with a orange  twist.
body: My texutre pack adds a clean pvp low shield pack to your game with helps with winning fights, decluttering your screen, and provides Smoother animations and colors to your game. This pack is also compatible with almost everypack i used in testing making it very good to use and easy to set up.
